name: Guardians of the Dafeng
overview: Xu Qi’an, a recent police academy graduate, awakens in a strange world filled with Confucians, Taoists, Buddhists, demons, and warlocks. Facing imminent exile to a remote frontier town, he seizes the chance to change his fate by joining a powerful organization of guardians.

trailers.title: 开挂日记预告：王鹤棣爆改大奉【大奉打更人 Guardians of the Dafeng】
首发预告：王鹤棣勇闯大奉世界【大奉打更人 Guardians of the Dafeng】
